summary: Phase 21 re-test. Both bug fixes confirmed working. All 20 test items pass. Backend 9/9, Frontend all critical flows verified.

react_native_issues.issue: useNativeDriver warning on web (non-blocking, cosmetic only)

bug_fix_verification.BUG_FIX_1_intro_skip_navigation: FIXED - Skip button navigates to /login (not stuck on /intro). router.replace('/login') works correctly bypassing index.tsx.
bug_fix_verification.BUG_FIX_2_otp_double_submit: FIXED - Only 1 POST /api/auth/verify-otp call observed (submittingRef guard works).

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both Phase 21 bug fixes verified. App fully functional at 20/20. Test user: 9876543210 / OTP 123456 (advocate profile pre-exists as Adv. Priya Sharma).
